function.name: read
function.description:
Read a file or directory from the filesystem.

- Use this when you know the file path and want to see its contents
- Returns file contents with line numbers (format: 'line_number: content')
- For directories, returns a listing of entries
- Use the search tool to find specific content in files
- Use bash with 'ls' or 'find' to discover what files exist

file_path.description: Absolute or relative path to the file to read

offset.description: Line number to start reading from (1-indexed). Optional.

limit.description: Maximum number of lines to read. Default 2000. Optional.
